message.content:
{
  "lean_declaration": "/-- Simple transposition `s_i` is a swap. (def.perm.si) -/\ntheorem simpleTransposition_isSwap {n : ℕ} (i : Fin (n - 1)) : (simpleTransposition i).IsSwap := by\n  have h_ne : (⟨i.val, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.isLt (Nat.sub_le n 1)⟩ : Fin n) ≠ ⟨i.val+1, by omega⟩ := by\n    intro h\n    have hval : (⟨i.val, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.isLt (Nat.sub_le n 1)⟩ : Fin n).val = (⟨i.val+1, by omega⟩ : Fin n).val := congrArg Fin.val h\n    have : i.val = i.val + 1 := by simpa using hval\n    exact (Nat.succ_ne_self i.val) this\n  refine ⟨⟨i.val, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.isLt (Nat.sub_le n 1)⟩, ⟨i.val+1, by omega⟩, h_ne, ?_⟩\n  rfl",
  "declaration_name": "simpleTransposition_isSwap",
  "used_context": [
    "simpleTransposition (local definition)",
    "Fin.val",
    "Nat.succ_ne_self",
    "Equiv.Perm.IsSwap"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Replaced omega tactic with Nat.succ_ne_self to avoid omega failure.",
    "Used explicit Fin terms instead of let bindings to make the swap equality definitional."
  ]
}
